product_information.product_name: Hugo Boss Deep Red eau de parfum 50 ML
product_information.description: Een opwindende, sensuele geur van Hugo Boss. Geurnoten van o.a. kruidige noot en sandelhout.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: ALCOHOL DENAT. PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) • AQUA (WATER) • ETHYLHEXYL METHOXYCINNAMATE • DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE BHT BENZYL SALICYLATE LIMONENE LINALOOL HYDROXYCITRONELLAL BENZYL ALCOHOL • HEXYL CINNAMAL • ISOEUGENOL • GERANIOL CITRAL • EUGENOL • EVERNIA FURFURACEA EXTRACT / EVERNIA FURFURACEA (TREEMOSS) EXTRACT • CITRONELLOL.
